text:
🚀 Built a Telegram AI Agent with n8n that uses OpenAI + SerpAPI to search Google for live 2026 FIFA World Cup updates before responding. Great practice with AI agents, prompt engineering, tool calling, and workflow automation.

#n8n #AIAgents #OpenAI #Automation
name: ovibuks

text:
Built another AI Agent with n8n!

I created a Telegram AI Agent that provides 2026 FIFA World Cup updates.

Key concepts I practiced:
⚽ AI Agents
🤖 Prompt Engineering (role, tone, goals & guardrails)
🔍 Live Web Search with SerpAPI
💬 Telegram Integration
⚙️ Workflow automation

- Self host and extend with components
